falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above $4500 (key resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a breakout rather than a bottom pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 2.5x the 30-day average daily volume for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a fundamental shift in market dynamics contradicting the current uncertainty

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and stays there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp and sustained increase in bond yields would indicate strong risk-on sentiment, directly contradicting the blowoff pattern implications

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
